creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to ohartman from comment #1)

You have to use PGSQL <= 9.4 for postgis 2.1

http://trac.osgeo.org/postgis/wiki/UsersWikiPostgreSQLPostGIS

As proposed, maybe we need something like a port framework.

Instead of a RUN_DEPENDS or LIB_DEPENDS, just put USE=postgis like USE=pgsl and define or not which versions we need. Also postgis.mk can check if the version of pgsql is compatible with postgis version?
